Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.

    Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.

    Requires 
    Modifier Module Description
    transitive com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
    Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
    Indirect Requires 
    Modifier Module Description
    transitive com.github.cowwoc.requirements.annotations

    transitive com.github.cowwoc.requirements.maven_plugin
